parameters.subject: =[WooCommerce] Missing Product Image — Product #{{ $json.product_id }}
=[Approval Needed] Social post for "{{ $json.name }}"
=[URGENT] Social Publisher FAILED — {{ $json.product_name }}

parameters.content: # WooCommerce Auto-Publisher to Instagram and Facebook

# Overview
When a new product is created in WooCommerce, this workflow validates and auto-publishes to social:

1. Normalize data and extract images
2. Block products with no images and alert
3. Check Google Sheets for duplicates
4. Generate captions with OpenAI or fallback
5. Format posts and optionally wait for approval
6. Publish Instagram carousel and Facebook photo
7. Log results and alert on failure

# Node-by-node Purpose

1. WooCommerce Trigger
Listens for product.created

2. Set: Normalize Product Data
Extracts id, name, price, images

3. Code: Validate & Extract Images
Validates fields and cleans HTML

4. IF: Has Images?
Checks images and validity

5. Gmail: Missing Image Alert
Emails admin about missing images

6. Sheets: Log Activity
Appends results to log sheet

7. Sheets: Check Duplicate
Looks up prior publishes

8. Code: Duplicate Detector
Sets duplicate flag

9. IF: Already Posted?
Skips if already published

10. Code: Build AI Prompt
Builds OpenAI prompts

11. OpenAI: Generate Caption + Hashtags
Creates social copy

12. Code: Parse AI Response
Validates JSON output

13. IF: Caption OK?
Routes to fallback if needed

14. Code: Fallback Template
Builds basic caption

15. Code: Format Final Post
Adds hashtags and trims

16. IF: Approval Required?
Checks env approval flag

17. Gmail: Send for Approval
Emails captions for review

18. Wait: For Approval
Pauses 24 hours

19. Code: Prepare Carousel Data
Prepares images and captions

20. Code: Create + Publish IG Carousel
Publishes to Instagram

21. HTTP: Publish to Facebook
Posts photo to Facebook Page

22. Code: Build Log Entry
Builds final status

23. Gmail: Final Failure Alert
Emails on publish failure
